ocr.text: In Table 1, the headers include Community ASP, School-based ASP, and Group difference, with respective columns for % Time
at activity level and P (difference from 0) for both ASP types and the % Time at activity level and P (for group difference). For
the Baseline row, all values are marked as “—.” The LMVPA values are 78.4 for Community ASP with a P value of <0.001,
75.8 for School-based ASP with a P value of <0.001, resulting in a group difference of 2.6 with a P value of 0.30. In the MVPA
row, values are 30.1 for Community ASP with a P value of <0.001, 24.2 for School-based ASP with a P value of <0.001,
yielding a group difference of 5.9 with a P value of 0.06. The Change per measurement period (6 weeks)* row also holds a "—"
for Baseline. The LMVPA change values are 3.0 with a P value of 0.006, −3.4 with a P value of 0.002, and a group difference of
6.4 with a P value of <0.001. The MVPA change values are 2.8 with a P value of 0.006, −1.6 with a P value of 0.12, and a group
difference of 4.4 with a P value of 0.002. In Table 2, the headers include SNP number, Genomic location (bp), Location of new
site in MYOC genome, Location of new site in Mutated MYOC genome, Splice site type, Length of altered protein product,
and Known association with disease. The SNP 67 (A>G) row shows 4453 (Intron), 4449, 4449, A, 215, No. SNP 12 (G>A) has
